visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white off-shoulder top stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She holds a large brown box of Lotte Dream Cake chocolate pies, pointing at it while speaking expressively. The background is filled with rows of supermarket shelves stocked with snack products. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room. The woman is seated behind a table with two boxes of the chocolate pies. Behind her is a brown leather sofa and a small pink child's toy. She gestures with her hands, describing the product. (3) A sequence of close-up shots follows, showing the product box packaging and then a cross-section of the chocolate pie on a small purple plate, revealing its white cream layer. The lighting is soft and warm. (4) The woman tastes the pie, showing a delighted facial expression. She continues her review, gesturing with a 'seven' sign and finally holding up the boxes with a wide smile to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 韓國爆紅樂天夢幻派. [Variety]: 충격적이었습니다. (2) [Subtitle]: 它是一個巧克力派蛋糕. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後這一箱 429元. (4) [Subtitle]: 裡面有36顆. (5) [Subtitle]: 每一顆是12元. (6) [Variety]: 香氣十足. [Variety]: 入口即化. [Variety]: 分量滿滿. (7) [Subtitle]: 聽說冰冰箱也很好吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 來試試看究竟值不值得. (9) [Slogan]: 不要錯過了. (10) [Slogan]: 大人味巧克力派. (11) [Subtitle]: 它呢 如果是常溫吃會融融的. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後像是布朗尼一樣在嘴巴裡入口即化. (13) [Subtitle]: 很鬆軟綿密. (14) [Subtitle]: 最重要是巧克力味超濃. (15) [Subtitle]: 如果冰冰箱的話就變得很Q. (16) [Subtitle]: QQ的 冰冰的也很好吃. (17) [Subtitle]: 那這個它是從外表到內餡都是濃厚的巧克力. (18) [Subtitle]: 甜度的話 1-10分我們會給7分. (19) [Subtitle]: 真的很好吃耶 難怪在韓國爆紅. (20) [Subtitle]: 現在台灣好市多也買得到囉.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat, a white off-shoulder lace top, and blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first background is a Costco warehouse aisle with high metal shelves full of packaged goods like instant noodles and snacks. The second background is a home living room featuring a brown leather sofa, a white wall, and domestic decorations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female speech begins immediately with a bright, cheerful tone. Upbeat electronic BGM with a steady kick drum pulse starts simultaneously. Faint background room tone from the warehouse is briefly audible but quickly masked by production. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as she mentions the price. The music maintains a constant tempo while her speech rate increases slightly to deliver item details. (3) A transition whoosh sound effect marks the scene change to the living room. The acoustic texture shifts to a cleaner, dryer indoor vocal capture. (4) A 'pop' SFX occurs during a jump cut to a product close-up. The music swells slightly in the mix during the tasting segment. (5) Final phase features a rapid sequence of descriptive adjectives delivered with rising intonation, accompanied by sparkly UI sound effects. The BGM fades out sharply with the video end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and recommend a popular Korean chocolate pie available at Costco in Taiwan, highlighting its price, taste, and texture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently displays and focuses the entire video on reviewing a specific brand of chocolate pie found at a retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media-style editing with colorful text overlays and high-pitched, enthusiastic narration to maintain viewer engagement.
